mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, mechanically elevating equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >55% of observations when FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 8.0 percent signals severe labor market slack that suppresses consumer spending and corporate profit margins, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) when unemployment stabilizes above 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail auto sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand across durable goods and real estate, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in >50% of cases, or interaction term Rank IC < 0.04 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index values reflect strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to positive short-term S&P 500 returns within a post-shock recovery regime.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases of >0.5% month-over-month are followed by negative 5-day returns in >55% of observations during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index readings above 228.0 trigger expectations of premature monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL breaches above 228.0 but forward returns remain positive in >60% of cases, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls directly expand aggregate income and consumption capacity, mechanically supporting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth > 100k is followed by negative 60-day returns in >55% of observations, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in real GDP and retail auto sales confirms broad-based demand recovery, reducing recession probability and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive co-movement in GDPC1 and RSAFS yields negative 20-day returns in >50% of cases, or interaction Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between stagnant industrial production and rising consumer prices signals supply-constrained inflation, prompting risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The divergence pattern produces positive 5-day returns in >60% of observations, or the interaction signal Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.
